variables.description: The external hostname (domain) where FluffyChat Web will be accessible. For example, chat.example.com.
variables.label: FluffyChat Web Hostname

variables.description: The hostname (domain) of your Matrix homeserver (e.g., Matrix Synapse) that FluffyChat Web will connect to. For example, matrix.example.com.
variables.label: Matrix Homeserver Hostname

variables.description: The Client ID for OpenID Connect (OIDC) if configured with your Matrix homeserver. Leave blank if not using OIDC.
variables.label: OIDC Client ID (Optional)

variables.description: URL for the Pushgateway service, if you want FluffyChat Web to send metrics. Leave blank if not using.
variables.label: Pushgateway URL (Optional)
